name: enrich-work-item
description: Apply type-specific enricher prompts to produce team-format Epic, Feature, or User Story documentation; persist on approval. When source is an Azure DevOps URL or id, ingests work-item fields, attachments, and description-referenced documents before enrichment.

source.description: URL (Azure DevOps work-item URL or external doc), vault path, or inline text to enrich. Azure sources trigger attachment and description-reference resolution per references/azure-ingest.md.

parent.description: Parent work item id or URL for hierarchy context. Optional when source is Azure — defaults to System.Parent from the fetched item.

attachment.description: Additional documentation URL or path, merged with any attachments discovered on an Azure source work item
